tasks.label: Sync Python Environment
tasks.command: uv sync && .venv/bin/python -c "import os, subprocess; name = os.path.basename(os.getcwd()).split('-')[-1]; subprocess.run(['git', 'config', '--local', 'user.name', name]); subprocess.run(['git', 'config', '--local', 'user.email', f'{name}@unottingham.ac.uk'])"
